I'm watching [this](https://builder.limex.com/dashboard/101131) strategy for couple of months now and realized that performance is going down since money flow from dividend stocks. However, I found it pretty interesting as a strategy to bet against and maybe short these stocks. What are your thoughts? Anyone shorting names from the list above?
